ion-button-style md button button-round button-solid ion-activatable ion-focusable hydrated

reviewSummary.summary: The draft captures the core login controls but contains duplicate password elements, brittle locators, weak semantic naming, and missing validation/navigation elements required for reliable downstream automation.

issues.message: Two separate elements represent the same password control. One is the internal native input and the other is the parent ion-input wrapper.
issues.suggested_fix: Keep only the stable password field element using locator id=password and remove the duplicate native input element id=ion-input-1.

issues.message: Locator id=ion-input-0 appears framework-generated and brittle. Ionic-generated IDs are likely unstable across sessions or builds.
issues.suggested_fix: Use a more stable locator such as xpath=//input[@placeholder='User Name'] or another business-stable attribute.

issues.message: Element name is too generic and does not clearly identify the control purpose.
issues.suggested_fix: Rename to password_textbox for consistency and readability.

issues.message: The ion-input wrapper element is classified as a textbox even though it is a component wrapper around the actual input field.
issues.suggested_fix: Retain only the actionable password input element and remove the wrapper classification.

issues.message: The locator relies primarily on visible text and may become brittle if button text changes.
issues.suggested_fix: Prefer a more stable attribute-based locator if available while keeping text fallback support.

issues.message: Background container is decorative/layout-only and does not provide workflow automation value.
Back button required by the workflow and acceptance criteria is missing from the page model.
issues.suggested_fix: Add a reusable back_button element with a stable locator.

issues.message: Home button required by the workflow and acceptance criteria is missing from the page model.
issues.suggested_fix: Add a reusable home_button element with a stable locator.

issues.message: No authentication error message element is modeled even though failed login validation is a major workflow expectation.
issues.suggested_fix: Add a login_error_message element representing visible authentication failure feedback.

issues.message: Required-field validation elements are missing despite explicit acceptance criteria for username and password validation.
issues.suggested_fix: Add reusable required_validation_message elements or dedicated username/password validation message elements.

issues.message: No authenticated-state indicator or logged-in username element is present for successful-login verification.
issues.suggested_fix: Add an authenticated_user_indicator or logged_in_username element to support post-login validation.

approved_elements.name: username_textbox
approved_elements.description: Username input field for customer authentication.

approved_elements.name: password_textbox
approved_elements.description: Password input field with masked entry behavior.

approved_elements.name: sign_in_button
approved_elements.description: Primary action button used to authenticate the user.
